race.comment: SPICY THANG (6) jumped favourite in a BM66+ last start and was gunned down late after looking the winner on straightening. Pike reunites with her now and a wet deck won't be an issue. Has the speed to work across from out wide and can land the knockout blow third-up. POBLANO (8) is a nice mare on the rise, returning with a bang and the horse she beat coming out and winning last week. Loses Pike, but she returned with a new career best and with further improvement expected, she can extend her winning run. ROCK THE MARKET (9) looks to get plenty of favours here and is not to be discounted. DELTASON (2) has to be included after a good return effort.
